choices.label: 6–8(9) poriën in lacunae; costae; exine 1,2–1,7 µm.

outcome.text:
33.10 *Ribes*

Poriën 3–5 µm, 1–2 per lacuna; costae 1–2 µm breed. Exine psilaat tot zwak scabraat, 1,2–1,7 µm.

*Ribes alpinum* L. (4)
20,8–27,0 µm, MiW 24,2 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Ribes nigrum* L. (3)
30,0–40,5 µm, MiW 35,5 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Ribes petraeum* WULFEN (3)
28,0–35,0 µm, MiW 32,1 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Ribes rubrum* L. (3)
24,0–33,0 µm, MiW 29,3 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Ribes spicatum* ROBSON (1)
25,3–32,5 µm, MiW 31,2 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Ribes uva-crispa* L. (3)
26,5–39,5 µm, MiW 31,1 µm; 50 PK, 0a
